rows.label: qev085903_MSG0002
rows.name: Isn't it? We went through a lot of trouble to get it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0003
rows.name:
S-So, um...
To turn this into a bracelet, how much would...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0004
rows.name: I apologize, but it's impossible for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0007
rows.name: I tried measuring its hardness... and it surpasses that of a diamond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0009
rows.name: I'm sorry, but my equipment simply can't handle it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0010
rows.name:
Shingo, was it?
I feel bad for the boy from earlier. I can usually process most things, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0011
rows.name: If it's harder than a diamond, there's nothing my machines can do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0012
rows.name: Please ask someone else. Military-grade machinery, or perhaps technology even greater than that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085903_MSG0013
rows.name: For instance, alien machinery might be able to process that beautiful stone.[ST:wait ]
